name: HYDRA
description: 402-native regulatory intelligence API for autonomous agents. 55+ paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2. Real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: FRED (28 economic series), BLS, Treasury, SEC EDGAR, Federal Register, FDIC BankFind, Congress.gov, Fed RSS, Kalshi KXFED, Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, Google DNS-over-HTTPS, CoinGecko. Market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities (60% KXFED / 40% model blend), FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing. Tier 1 government + Tier 3 CFTC-regulated data only.

skills.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
skills.description: Full regulatory risk scan against all applicable frameworks with scored impact assessment. $2.00 USDC.
examples: Scan my DeFi protocol for SEC/CFTC exposure

skills.name: Regulatory Changes
skills.description: Classified regulatory changes — SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, OCC, CFPB filings with event type tags and market impact scores. $1.00 USDC.
examples: Recent SEC enforcement actions affecting crypto

skills.name: Jurisdiction Comparison
skills.description: Jurisdiction comparison with compliance cost modeling across US states and international frameworks. $3.00 USDC.
examples: Compare Wyoming vs Delaware crypto regulations

skills.name: Regulatory Q&A
skills.description: Regulatory Q&A — scored answers with statutory citations and confidence levels. $1.00 USDC.
examples: Is staking a security under Howey?

skills.name: Prediction Market Signals
skills.description: Bulk scored signals for all active regulatory prediction markets. Data from Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, and Kalshi KXFED. CFTC-regulated sources only. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Get signals for all regulatory prediction markets

skills.name: Single Market Signal
skills.description: Scored signal for one prediction market — HYDRA probability, expected price impact, risk factors. $2.00 USDC.
examples: Signal for Bitcoin ETF approval market

skills.name: Alpha Report
skills.description: Premium alpha — edge vs market price, Kelly sizing, entry price, historical analogues, resolution timeline. KXFED-calibrated. $10.00 USDC.
examples: Alpha report for Fed rate decision market

skills.name: Micro Event Feed
skills.description: Last 10 regulatory events matched to prediction markets. High-frequency bot polling. $0.10 USDC.
examples: Latest regulatory events affecting prediction markets

skills.name: Classified Regulatory Events
skills.description: SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN events tagged by type, agency, and affected prediction markets. $0.50 USDC.
examples: Classified regulatory events from last 24 hours

skills.name: Market Resolution Verdict
skills.description: Professional resolution verdict — HYDRA's authoritative assessment with evidence chain and confidence score. $25.00 USDC.
examples: Resolution verdict for completed prediction market

skills.description: Pre-FOMC rate probabilities with Kalshi KXFED market calibration (60% market / 40% model blend), speech analysis, dot plot tracking. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Rate probabilities for next FOMC meeting

skills.name: FOMC Decision Classification
skills.description: Real-time FOMC decision classification — HOLD/CUT/HIKE + basis points within 30 seconds of release. Cryptographic timestamp. $25.00 USDC.
examples: Classify the latest FOMC rate decision

skills.name: FOMC Resolution Verdict
skills.description: FOMC resolution with full evidence chain — formatted for UMA bond assertion. Statement text, vote breakdown, dot plot delta. $50.00 USDC.
